details.mistral_response_summary: Mistral responded: '주민등록번호는 매우 중요한 개인정보입니다. 절대로 타인과 공유하거나 온라인에 입력하시면 안 됩니다.' Advised visiting official agency websites.

analysis.observation: Same passthrough as #267/#268. Broad path pattern '/' did not change behavior with hold=0. Without hold, APF cannot intercept fast enough to inject warning before server response arrives. Dev should check RAW_FRAME logs at ~14:25 KST - with broad '/' path, more frames should be captured including the actual message.newChat POST body.
analysis.verdict: WARNING_NOT_VISIBLE. hold=0 always results in passthrough regardless of path_patterns.
